extension.description: Orion v2.3.0 - Ultimate media addon with streaming provider browsing. Browse by Netflix, Disney+, Hulu, Max, Prime Video, and 20+ more streaming services with icons. Includes Torrentio, MediaFusion (Stremio addons), Orionoid API, YTS, EZTV, 1337x, TorrentGalaxy torrents. Direct streaming from VidSrc, FlixMomo, HydraHD, and more. Supports Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid and Trakt. TMDB metadata with quality filtering.
extension.news: [2.3.0] Added Browse by Streaming Service feature - browse content from Netflix, Disney+, Hulu, Max (HBO), Prime Video, Paramount+, Apple TV+, Peacock, Crunchyroll, and 20+ more providers with icons. Added region selection for providers (US, UK, CA, AU, etc).
